Items.Author: basit9958

Items.Title: 有趣的输出缓冲区问题！ | interesting output buffer question!
Items.Description:
要更新，这是给我的说明。

从 jyy 那里，我得到了一个非常有趣的问题。

像这样的感觉，这里有一些代码：

 #include <stdio.h> #include <unistd.h> #include <sys/wait.h>
int main ( int argc , char * argv []) { int n = 2 ; for ( int i = 0 ; i < n ; i ++ ) { fork (); printf ( "Hello \n " ); } for ( int i = 0 ; i < n ; i ++ ) { wait ( NULL ); } }

如果我们运行这个程序，我们可以得到这个结果：

 //gcc fork-printf.c && ./a.out Hello Hello Hello Hello Hello Hello

有六个“你好”

但是当我们使用管道命令时，像这样：

 //gcc fork-printf.c && ./a.out | cat Hello Hello Hello Hello Hello Hello Hello Hello

我们会得到八个“你好”。

为什么

在 linux 中，当我们使用标准输出时：

对于termianl：linux使用line buffer ，如果遇到字符\n ，linux使用系统调用输出所有缓冲区。

对于管道/文件：linux 使用full buffer ，当缓冲区大小达到 4096B 时，（除了我们调用fflush(stdout) ）。

条件Ⅰ，使用行缓冲，直接输出； 否则，对于条件Ⅱ，使用full buffer。

Ivad Yves HABIMANA - Ivad Yves HABIMANA - May 14 5月14日



原文:

to be update, this is a note for me.

From jyy,I get a very interesting problem.

Sence like this,here are some code:

#include <stdio.h>
#include <unistd.h>
#include <sys/wait.h>

int main(int argc, char *argv[]) { int n = 2; for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { fork(); printf("Hello\n"); } for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { wait(NULL); }
}

if we run this programe, we can get this result:

//gcc fork-printf.c && ./a.out
Hello
Hello
Hello
Hello
Hello
Hello

there has six 'hello'

but when we use the pipe command,like this:

//gcc fork-printf.c && ./a.out | cat
Hello
Hello
Hello
Hello
Hello
Hello
Hello
Hello

we will get eight 'hello'.

why

In linux, when we use stdout:

for termianl: linux use line buffer, if meet character \n, linux use system calling to output all buffer.

for pipe/file: linux use full buffer, when the size of buffer is up to 4096B, (except that we call fflush(stdout)).

for conition Ⅰ，use line buffer, directly output; otherwise, for condition Ⅱ, use full buffer.

Ivad Yves HABIMANA - May 14
Items.Author: iqium

Items.Title: 我如何开始数据科学职业？ | How do I start a Data Science Career?
Items.Description:
数据科学是一个快速发展的领域，并且有很好的机会。 但是你怎么能成为一名数据科学家呢？ 数据科学是一个具有挑战性的领域，但只要具备适当的技能，你就可以胜任。

你可能有很多疑问，比如应该关注哪些技术，Python 最好还是 R？ 编码是开始职业的必要条件吗？ 你需要在技术教育方面毕业吗？ 需要的统计知识水平？ 在本文中，我们将讨论什么是重要的，什么不是。 成为一名数据科学家需要学习和忘记什么。

选择正确的工作角色！

数据科学有许多工作角色，如数据可视化专家、机器学习专家、数据科学家、数据工程师等知名人士。 您可以根据您的教育背景或经验选择工作角色。 如果您仍然感到困惑，请彻底了解该行业。 与专家交谈，深入了解工作职责。 您还可以在考虑工作角色时获得导师的帮助和他们的建议。

开始数据科学培训

在决定了哪个角色对您有利之后，请花一些时间并了解该角色，因为每个角色都有其职责。 角色可能相同，但职责可能因组织而异。 下一步是选择一个好的数据科学培训机构来开始您的数据科学培训。 许多机构提供数据科学培训计划。 始终选择提供安置帮助和职业指导的机构。 在开始程序之前检查评级和评论。 加入课程后，请确保您积极参与，关注所有作业和实时项目，并清除您的所有疑虑。 在完成培训之前，尝试开发您的应用程序或程序并寻求培训师的帮助； 这将帮助您获得信心。

选择一种工具/语言！

对您选择的语言/工具有一个很好的理解总是至关重要的。 没有适当的知识，您就无法最佳地应用它。 实用知识将在您未来的项目中帮助您。 现在下一步是什么工具或语言最好？ 从所有语言中最简单的开始总是更好。 在使用工具时，如果您来自非编码背景，则从基于 GUI 的工具开始，一旦精通它，您就可以尝试编码。 点击这里学习数据科学课程

加入支持小组

确定角色后，开始准备。 首先，加入一个在线支持小组。 支持小组可以帮助您理解事物并让您保持积极性。 开始一个新的职业是可怕的，知道还有其他人经历过你正在经历的事情，这让我松了一口气。 您总是可以通过互联网进行有意义的技术讨论。

实践知识比理论更重要

在接受培训时，重要的是要专注于实际应用，而不仅仅是理论。 它将帮助您更好地理解这个概念。 练习所有作业，处理少量数据集并将它们应用到您正在学习的内容中。 尝试了解已经解决的数据集，这将使您深入了解该主题。

数据库和SQL知识

数据需要放入表格中，作为初学者，您可以使用 CSV 或 excel 文件来表格数据，但它不能是永久的。 数据存储技术和最少的大数据知识将为您的简历增添价值。

沟通技巧

我们大多数人都忘记了沟通技巧对任何工作都很重要。 作为一名数据科学家，您需要具备出色的沟通技巧，因为您将与所有部门合作，收集数据并交付他们需要的东西。 开始专注于沟通技巧并与团队合作将帮助您在工作中成长并使您的任务更容易。

网络

你是数据科学的新手，所以最初更专注于学习和实践。 一旦你确信你拥有工作所需的知识。 开始参观会议和研讨会； 这将帮助您建立一个网络，帮助您以后找到工作。 点击这里学习数据科学课程大纲

结论

我们已经在本文中指出了您开始数据科学职业所需的所有重要事项。 加入一个好的培训机构将在各个方面为您提供帮助。 也是你需要的导师。 世界一流的课程、LMS 访问、实时项目和作业将帮助您掌握该主题。 接受 IIT、ISB 和 IIM 专业人士的培训，并提供安置帮助。



原文:

Data Science is a rapidly growing domain and has good opportunities. But how can you become a Data Scientist? Data Science is a challenging domain, but with the appropriate skill-set, you can run the show.

You might have many doubts like- what techniques to focus on, Is Python best or R? is coding a must to start the career? Do you need to have graduation in technical education? Level of statistics knowledge needed? In this article, we will discuss what is vital and what’s not. What to learn and unlearn to become a Data Scientist.

Choose the job role right!

Data Science has many job roles like Data Visualization expert, Machine Learning expert, Data Scientist, Data Engineer well-known ones. You can pick a job role depending on your educational background or experience. If you are still confused, get a thorough understanding of the industry. Talk to experts and get a deep understanding of the job responsibilities. You can also take the help of a mentor and their suggestions in considering the job role.

Start a Data Science Training

After deciding what role is good for you, dedicate some time and understand the role as every role has its responsibilities. The role might be the same but, responsibilities might differ from one organization to other. The next step is choosing a good Data Science Training Institute to start your Data Science training. Many institutes offer Data Science Training Programs. Always go for an institute that provides placement assistance and career guidance. Check the rating and reviews before starting the program. After joining the course, make sure you participate actively, follow all the assignments and real-time projects and clear all your doubts. Before completing the training, try to develop your app or a program and take help from your trainers; This will help you gain confidence.

Pick a tool/ language!

It is always vital to have a good understanding of the language/tool you chose. Without the proper knowledge, you cannot apply it optimally. Practical knowledge will help you in your future projects. Now the next step is what tool or language is best? It is always better to start with the simplest of all languages. While coming to tools, if you are from a non-coding background start with GUI-based tools, and once well versed with it you can try the coding. Click here to learn data science course

Join a support group

After deciding the role, start your preparation. Firstly, join an online support group. A support group helps you understand things and keeps you motivated. Starting a new career is scary and it is relieving to know that there are others out there who have experienced what you are experiencing. You can always have a meaningful technical discussion over the internet.

Practical knowledge is pivotal than theory

While undergoing training, it is vital to concentrate on practical applications than just theory. It will help you in a better understanding of the concept. Practice all the assignments, work on few data sets and apply them to you’re learning. Try understanding already solved data sets that will provide you an insight into the subject.

Database and SQL knowledge

SQL is the most important basic skill you need to become a Data Science professional. Data needs to be put in tables and as a beginner, you might use CSV or an excel file to table data, but it cannot be permanent. Data storage techniques and minimal Big Data Knowledge will add value to your resume.

Communication Skills

Most of us forget communication skills are important for any job. As a Data Scientist, you need to have exceptional communication skills as you will be working with all the departments collecting data and delivering what they need. Start concentrating on communication skills and working with a team will help you grow in the job and make your tasks easier.

Network

You are new to Data Science, so concentrate more on learning and practicing initially. Once you are confident that you have the required knowledge of the job. Start visiting meetings and seminars; this will help you build a network that will help you in bagging a job later. Click here to learn Data Science Course Syllabus

Conclusion

We have pointed all the vital things in this article that are needed to start your career in Data Science. Joining a good training institute will help you in all aspects. 360DigiTMG is one such place that offers the best training programs and also guides you through your journey. And is also the mentor you need. A world-class curriculum, LMS access, real-time projects, and assignments will help you in mastering the subject. Get trained by IIT, ISB and, IIM professionals with placement assistance.
Items.Author: seospecialist

Items.Title: Go Echo API 服务器开发 | Go Echo API Server Development
Items.Description:
基于最低配置启动项目创建一个简单的api服务器，功能如下

  • 通过sql-migrate进行数据库迁移
  • 来自gorm的应用程序的数据库操作
  • 为每个生产和开发环境切换配置文件
  • 用户认证中间件

此外，假设Firebase 身份验证用于用户身份验证，MySQL 用于数据库

我们做什么

两个 API，一个用于检索博客文章列表，另一个用于更新已发布的文章。 任何人都可以访问列出文章的 API，更新文章的 API 只能由发布文章的人访问。

准备

设置

克隆基础项目

$ git clone https://github.com/nrikiji/go-echo-sample

编辑数据库连接信息以匹配您的环境 config.yml 

 development : dialect : mysql datasource : root:@tcp(localhost:3306)/go-echo-example?charset=utf8mb4&collation=utf8mb4_general_ci&parseTime=true dir : migrations table : migrations ...

发布表创建

$ sql-migrate -config config.yml create_posts $ vi migrations/xxxxxxx-create_posts.sql -- +migrate Up CREATE TABLE ` posts ` ( ` id ` bigint ( 20 ) unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, ` user_id ` bigint ( 20 ) unsigned NOT NULL, ` title ` varchar ( 64 ) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL, ` body ` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ( ` id ` ) , FOREIGN KEY ( ` user_id ` ) REFERENCES ` users ` ( ` id ` ) ) ENGINE = InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET = utf8mb4 COLLATE = utf8mb4_unicode_ci ; $ sql-migrate up -env development -config config.yml $ sql-migrate up -env test -config config.yml

此外，用户表的迁移文件包含在基础项目中（只有 id、name 和 firebase_uid 的简单表）

注册虚拟数据

从 firebase 控制台创建一个具有电子邮件地址 + 密码身份验证的用户，并获取 Web 的 API 密钥（项目设置 > 常规中的 Web API 密钥）。

此外，将用于使用 Firebase Admin SDK（Project Settings > Service Account 中的 Firebase Admin SDK）的私钥添加到项目的根目录。 从 API 获取注册用户的 localId（Firebase 用户 ID）和 idToken。 这次直接请求firebase登录API获取idToken和localId

 $ curl 'https://identitytoolkit.googleapis.com/v1/accounts:signInWithPassword?key=APIキー' \ -h 'Content-Type: application/json' \ -d '{"email": "foo@example.com", "password": "password", "returnSecureToken":true}' | jq { "localId" : "xxxxxxxxxxxxxxx" , "idToken" : "xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx" , } }

使用获取的 localId 在 DB 中注册一个用户。

 insert into users ( id , firebase_uid , name , created_at , updated_at ) values ( 1 , "xxxxxxxxxxxxxxx" , "user1" , now (), now ()); insert into posts ( user_id , title , body , created_at , updated_at ) values ( 1 , "title1" , "body1" , now (), now ()), ( 2 , "title2" , "body2" , now (), now ());

现在我们已准备好进行开发

实现数据操作部分

准备一个模型，该模型表示从 DB 检索到的记录。

模型/post.go

 package model type Post struct { ID uint `gorm: "primaryKey" json: "id"` UserID uint `json: "user_id"` User User `json: "user"` Title string `json: "title"` Body string `json: "body"` }

使用 gorm 将方法添加到存储中以从数据库中检索和更新。 由于我们在基础项目中有一个 UserStore，所以这次我们添加了 AllPosts 和 UpdatePost 方法

商店/post.go

 package store import ( "errors" . "go-echo-starter/model" "gorm.io/gorm" ) func ( us * UserStore ) AllPosts () ([] model . Post , error ) { var p [] model . Post err := us . db . Preload ( "User" ) . Find ( & p ) . Error if err ! = nil { if errors . Is ( err , gorm . ErrRecordNotFound ) { return p , nil } return nil , err } return p , nil } func ( us * UserStore ) UpdatePost ( post * model . Post ) error { return us . db . Model ( post ) . Updates ( post ) . Error }

实现采集 API

实现从商店获取模型并在请求时以 json 格式返回响应的部分。

执行

处理程序/post.go

 package handler Import ( "go-echo-starter/model" "net/http" "net/http" "github.com/labstack/echo/v4" ) type postsResponse struct { ( type postsResponse struct ) posts [] model . Post `json: "posts"` } func ( h * Handler ) getPosts ( c echo . Context ) error { . posts , err := h . userStore . AllPosts () if err ! = nil { return err return c . JSON ( http . StatusOK , postsResponse { Posts : posts })) }

当使用路由中名为 /posts 的路径发出 GET 请求时调用处理程序

处理程序/routes.go

 package handler Import ( "go-echo-starter/middleware" "github.com/labstack/echo/v4" ) func ( h * Handler ) Register ( api * echo . Group ){ . ... api . GET ( "/posts" , h . getPosts ) }

检查操作

$ go run server.go ... $ curl http://localhost:8000/api/posts | jq { "posts" : [ { "id" : 1, "user_id" : 1, "user" : { "id" : 1, "name" : "user1" , } , "title" : "title1" , "body" : "body1" , } , } , "title" : "title1" , "body" : "body1" , } }

写测试

准备两个带有夹具的测试数据

固定装置/posts.yml

 - id : 1 user_id : 1 title : " Title1" body : " Body1" - id : 2 user_id : 2 title : " Title2" body : " Body2"

为处理程序编写测试。 在这里我们测试没有错误，并且项目数匹配。

处理程序/post_test.go

 package handler import ( "encoding/json" "net/http" "net/http/httptest" "testing" "github.com/labstack/echo/v4" "github.com/stretchr/testify/assert" ) func TestGetPosts ( t * testing . T ) { setup () req := httptest . NewRequest ( echo . GET , "/api/posts" , nil ) rec := httptest . NewRecorder () c := e . NewContext ( req , rec ) assert . NoError ( t , h . getPosts ( c )) if assert . Equal ( t , http . StatusOK , rec . Code ) { var res postsResponse err := json . Unmarshal ( rec . Body . Bytes (), & res ) assert . NoError ( t , err ) assert . Equal ( t , 2 , len ( res . Posts )) } }

运行测试

$ cd handler $ go test -run TestGetPosts ... ok go-echo-starter/handler 1.380s

实现更新 API

应用auth 中间件进行身份验证，以防止其他人更新他们的帖子。 这个中间件所做的就是从 http 头Authorization: Bearer xxxxx中设置的 firebase idToken 中获取 firebase 用户 id，使用 UID 作为 key 搜索 users 表，并将结果设置在结果设置在上下文中。

在处理程序中，如果可以从上下文中检索到用户，则认证成功； 如果不是，则身份验证失败。

 user := context . Get ( "user" ) if user == nil { // authentication fails } else { // authentication succeeded }

执行

处理程序/post.go

 type postResponse struct { { type postResponse struct post model . Post `json: "post"` . } type updatePostRequest struct { { { type updatePostRequest title string `json: "title" validate: "required"` body string `json: "body" validate: "required"` } func ( h * Handler ) updatePost ( c echo . Context ) error { // get user information // get user information u := c . Get ( "user" ) if u == nil { return c . JSON ( http . StatusForbidden , nil ) user := u . ( * model . User ) // get article id , _ := strconv . Atoi ( c . Param ( "id" )) post , err := h . userStore . FindPostByID ( id ) if err ! = nil { { . return c . JSON ( http . StatusInternalServerError , nil ) } else if post == nil { return c . JSON ( http . StatusNotFound , nil ) } // if it is someone else's post, consider it as unauthorized access if post . UserID ! = user . ID { { { if post . UserID ! = user . ID { { { if post . UserID ! return c . JSON ( http . StatusForbidden , nil ) } params := & updatePostRequest {} if err := c . Bind ( params ); err ! = nil { { . return c . JSON ( http . StatusInternalServerError , nil ) } // Validation if err := c . Validate ( params ); err ! = nil { { if err := c . Validate ( params ); err ! return c . JSON ( http . StatusBadRequest , ae . NewValidationError ( err , ae . ValidationMessages { "Title" : { "required" : "Please enter a title" }, "Body" : { "required" : "Please enter a body" }, }), ) } // Update data post . Title = params . Post . Body = params . Body if err := h . userStore . UpdatePost ( post ); err ! = nil { . return c . JSON ( http . StatusInternalServerError , nil ) } return c . JSON ( http . StatusOK , postResponse { Post : * post })) }

可以使用 go-playground/validator 的 ( https://github.com/go-playground/validator/blob/master/translations/ja/ja.go ) 功能完成验证，该功能允许您显示错误消息的默认多语言显示. 但是，这个应用程序并没有使用它，而是定义了一个以字段名称和验证规则名称为键的映射，并使用显示固定消息。

 if err := c . Validate ( params ); err ! = nil { return c . JSON ( http . StatusBadRequest , ae . NewValidationError ( err , ae . ValidationMessages { "Title" : { "required" : "required Title." }, "Body" : { "required" : "required Body" }, }), ) }

接下来，在路径 /posts 中发出 PATCH 请求时调用您创建的处理程序

处理程序/routes.go

 func ( h * Handler ) Register ( api * echo . Group ) { Auth := middleware . AuthMiddleware ( h . authStore , h . userStore ) ... api . PATCH ( "/posts/:id" , h . updatePost , auth ) }

操作确认

将上面得到的firebase idToken放到http头中，查看运行情况。

 $ go run server.go ... $ curl -X PATCH -H "Content-Type: application/json" \f rz -H "Authorization: Bearer xxxxxxxxxxxxxx" $ curl -d '{"title": "NewTitle", "body": "NewBody1"}' \ http://localhost:8000/api/posts/1 | jq { "post" : { "id" : 1, "title" : "NewTitle" , "body" : "NewBody1" , } } }

在尝试更新其他人的文章时检查错误

$ curl -X PATCH -H "Content-Type: application/json" \ -H "Authorization: Bearer xxxxxxxxxxxxxx" \} -d '{"title": "NewTitle", "body": "NewBody1"}' \ http://localhost:8000/api/posts/2 -v ... HTTP/1.1 403 Forbidden ...

写作测试

处理程序测试您可以更新自己的文章，但不能更新其他人的文章。

更新你自己的文章

处理程序/post_test.go

 func TestUpdatePostSuccess ( t * testing . T ) { setup () reqJSON := `{"title":"NewTitle", "body":"NewBody"}` authMiddleware := middleware . AuthMiddleware ( h . authStore , h . userStore ) req := httptest . NewRequest ( echo . PATCH , "/api/posts/:id" , strings . NewReader ( reqJSON )) req . Header . Set ( echo . HeaderContentType , echo . MIMEApplicationJSON ) req . Header . Set ( echo . HeaderAuthorization , "Bearer: ValidToken1" ) rec := httptest . NewRecorder () c := e . NewContext ( req , rec ) c . SetPath ( "/api/posts/:id" ) c . SetParamNames ( "id" ) c . SetParamValues ( "1" ) err := authMiddleware ( func ( c echo . Context ) error { return h . updatePost ( c ) })( c ) assert . NoError ( t , err ) if assert . Equal ( t , http . StatusOK , rec . Code ) { var res postResponse err := json . Unmarshal ( rec . Body . Bytes (), & res ) assert . NoError ( t , err ) assert . Equal ( t , "NewTitle" , res . Post . Title ) assert . Equal ( t , "NewBody" , res . Post . Body ) } }

使用基础项目中准备的模拟方法。

 func ( f * fakeAuthClient ) VerifyIDToken ( context context . Context , token string ) ( * auth . Token , error ) { var uid string if token == "ValidToken" { uid = "ValidUID" return & auth . Token { UID : uid }, nil } else if token == "ValidToken1" { uid = "ValidUID1" return & auth . Token { UID : uid }, nil } else { return nil , errors . New ( "Invalid Token" ) } }

试图更新别人的文章。

处理程序/post_test.go

 func TestUpdatePostForbidden ( t * testing . T ) { setup () reqJSON := `{"title":"NewTitle", "body":"NewBody"}` authMiddleware := middleware . AuthMiddleware ( h . authStore , h . userStore ) req := httptest . NewRequest ( echo . PATCH , "/api/posts/:id" , strings . NewReader ( reqJSON )) req . Header . Set ( echo . HeaderContentType , echo . MIMEApplicationJSON ) req . Header . Set ( echo . HeaderAuthorization , "Bearer: ValidToken1" ) rec := httptest . NewRecorder () c := e . NewContext ( req , rec ) c . SetPath ( "/api/posts/:id" ) c . SetParamNames ( "id" ) c . SetParamValues ( "2" ) err := authMiddleware ( func ( c echo . Context ) error { return h . updatePost ( c ) })( c ) assert . NoError ( t , err ) assert . Equal ( t , http . StatusForbidden , rec . Code ) }

测试运行

$ go test -run TestUpdatePostSuccess・・・ok go-echo-starter/handler 1.380s $ go test -run TestUpdatePostForbidden・・・ok go-echo-starter/handler 1.380s

结论

我们这次制作的样品
https://github.com/nrikiji/go-echo-sample/tree/blog-example https://github.com/nrikiji/go-echo-sample/tree/blog-example



原文:

Create a simple api server based on a minimum configuration start project with the following functions

  • db migration by sql-migrate
  • db operation from apps by gorm
  • Input check by go-playground/validator
  • Switching of configuration files for each production and development environment
  • User authentication middleware

https://github.com/nrikiji/go-echo-sample

Also, assume Firebase Authentication for user authentication and MySQL for database

What we make

Two APIs, one to retrieve a list of blog posts and the other to update posted posts. The API to list articles can be accessed by anyone, and the API to update articles can only be accessed by the person who posted the article.

Prepare

Setup

Clone the base project

$ git clone https://github.com/nrikiji/go-echo-sample

Edit database connection information to match your environment config.yml

development: dialect: mysql datasource: root:@tcp(localhost:3306)/go-echo-example?charset=utf8mb4&collation=utf8mb4_general_ci&parseTime=true dir: migrations table: migrations
...

posts table creation

$ sql-migrate -config config.yml create_posts $ vi migrations/xxxxxxx-create_posts.sql
-- +migrate Up
CREATE TABLE `posts` ( `id` bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `user_id` bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL, `title` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL, `body` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`id`), FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci; $ sql-migrate up -env development -config config.yml $ sql-migrate up -env test -config config.yml

Also, the migration file for the users table is included in the base project (simple table with only id, name and firebase_uid)

Register dummy data

Create a user with email address + password authentication from the firebase console and obtain an API key for the web (Web API key in Project Settings > General).

Also, add the private key for using Firebase Admin SDK (Firebase Admin SDK in Project Settings > Service Account) to the root of the project. (In this case, the file name is firebase_secret_key.json.

Obtain the localId (Firebase user ID) and idToken of the registered user from the API. localId is set in users.firebase_uid and idToken is set in the http header when requesting the API.

This time, request directly to firebase login API to get idToken and localId

$ curl 'https://identitytoolkit.googleapis.com/v1/accounts:signInWithPassword?key=APIキー' \
-h 'Content-Type: application/json' \
-d '{"email": "foo@example.com", "password": "password", "returnSecureToken":true}' | jq { "localId": "xxxxxxxxxxxxxxx", "idToken": "xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx", }
}

Register a user in DB with the obtained localId.

insert into users (id, firebase_uid, name, created_at, updated_at) values (1, "xxxxxxxxxxxxxxx", "user1", now(), now()); insert into posts (user_id, title, body, created_at, updated_at) values (1, "title1", "body1", now(), now()), (2, "title2", "body2", now(), now());

Now we are ready for development

Implement the data manipulation part

Prepare a model that represents records retrieved from DB.

model/post.go

package model type Post struct { ID uint `gorm: "primaryKey" json: "id"` UserID uint `json: "user_id"` User User `json: "user"` Title string `json: "title"` Body string `json: "body"`
}

Use gorm to add methods to the store to retrieve from and update the DB. Since we have a UserStore in the base project, we add the AllPosts and UpdatePost methods to it this time

store/post.go

package store import ( "errors". "go-echo-starter/model" "gorm.io/gorm"
) func (us *UserStore) AllPosts() ([]model.Post, error) { var p []model.Post err := us.db.Preload("User").Find(&p).Error if err ! = nil { if errors.Is(err, gorm.ErrRecordNotFound) { return p, nil } return nil, err } return p, nil
} func (us *UserStore) UpdatePost(post *model.Post) error { return us.db.Model(post).Updates(post).Error
}

Implementing the acquisition API

Implement the part that acquires the model from the store and returns the response in json when requested.

Implementation

handler/post.go

package handler Import ( "go-echo-starter/model" "net/http" "net/http" "github.com/labstack/echo/v4"
) type postsResponse struct { (type postsResponse struct) posts []model.Post `json: "posts"`
} func (h *Handler) getPosts(c echo.Context) error {. posts, err := h.userStore.AllPosts() if err ! = nil { return err return c.JSON(http.StatusOK, postsResponse{Posts: posts}))
}

Call the handler when a GET request is made with a path named /posts in a route

handler/routes.go

package handler Import ( "go-echo-starter/middleware" "github.com/labstack/echo/v4"
) func (h *Handler) Register(api *echo.Group){. ... api.GET("/posts", h.getPosts)
}

Check operation 

$ go run server.go
... $ curl http://localhost:8000/api/posts | jq
{ "posts": [ { "id": 1, "user_id": 1, "user": { "id": 1, "name": "user1", }, "title": "title1", "body": "body1", }, }, "title": "title1", "body": "body1", }
}

write test

Prepare two test data with fixtures

fixtures/posts.yml

- id: 1 user_id: 1 title: "Title1" body: "Body1" - id: 2 user_id: 2 title: "Title2" body: "Body2"

Write tests for the handler. Here we test that there is no error, and that the number of items matches.

handler/post_test.go

package handler import ( "encoding/json" "net/http" "net/http/httptest" "testing" "github.com/labstack/echo/v4" "github.com/stretchr/testify/assert"
) func TestGetPosts(t *testing.T) { setup() req := httptest.NewRequest(echo.GET, "/api/posts", nil) rec := httptest.NewRecorder() c := e.NewContext(req, rec) assert.NoError(t, h.getPosts(c)) if assert.Equal(t, http.StatusOK, rec.Code) { var res postsResponse err := json.Unmarshal(rec.Body.Bytes(), &res) assert.NoError(t, err) assert.Equal(t, 2, len(res.Posts)) }
}

Run a test

$ cd handler
$ go test -run TestGetPosts
...
ok go-echo-starter/handler 1.380s

Implement update API

Apply auth middleware for authentication to prevent others from updating their posts. What this middleware does is to get the firebase user id from the firebase idToken set in the http header Authorization: Bearer xxxxx, search the users table using the UID as a key, and set the result in The result is set in context.

In the handler, if the user can be retrieved from the context, authentication succeeds; if not, authentication fails.

user := context.Get("user")
if user == nil { // authentication fails
} else { // authentication succeeded
}

Implementation

handler/post.go

type postResponse struct { { type postResponse struct post model.Post `json: "post"`.
} type updatePostRequest struct { { { type updatePostRequest title string `json: "title" validate: "required"` body string `json: "body" validate: "required"`
} func (h *Handler) updatePost(c echo.Context) error { // get user information // get user information u := c.Get("user") if u == nil { return c.JSON(http.StatusForbidden, nil) user := u.(*model.User) // get article id, _ := strconv.Atoi(c.Param("id")) post, err := h.userStore.FindPostByID(id) if err ! = nil { {. return c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, nil) } else if post == nil { return c.JSON(http.StatusNotFound, nil) } // if it is someone else's post, consider it as unauthorized access if post.UserID ! = user.ID { { { if post.UserID ! = user.ID { { { if post.UserID ! return c.JSON(http.StatusForbidden, nil) } params := &updatePostRequest{} if err := c.Bind(params); err ! = nil { {. return c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, nil) } // Validation if err := c.Validate(params); err ! = nil { { if err := c.Validate(params); err ! return c.JSON( http.StatusBadRequest, ae.NewValidationError(err, ae.ValidationMessages{ "Title": {"required": "Please enter a title"}, "Body": {"required": "Please enter a body"}, }), ) } // Update data post.Title = params. Post.Body = params.Body if err := h.userStore.UpdatePost(post); err ! = nil { . return c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, nil) } return c.JSON(http.StatusOK, postResponse{Post: *post}))
}

Validation can be done using go-playground/validator's (https://github.com/go-playground/validator/blob/master/translations/ja/ja.go) functionality, which allows you to display default multilingual display of error messages. However, this app does not use it, but instead defines a map keyed by field name and validation rule name, and uses display fixed messages.

if err := c.Validate(params); err ! = nil { return c.JSON( http.StatusBadRequest, ae.NewValidationError(err, ae.ValidationMessages{ "Title": {"required": "required Title."}, "Body": {"required": "required Body"}, }), )
}

Next, call the handler you created when a PATCH request is made in routes with the path /posts

handler/routes.go

func (h *Handler) Register(api *echo.Group) { Auth := middleware.AuthMiddleware(h.authStore, h.userStore) ... api.PATCH("/posts/:id", h.updatePost, auth)
}

Confirmation of operation

Put the firebase idToken obtained above in the http header and check the operation.

$ go run server.go
... $ curl -X PATCH -H "Content-Type: application/json" \frz
-H "Authorization: Bearer xxxxxxxxxxxxxx" $ curl
-d '{"title": "NewTitle", "body": "NewBody1"}' \
http://localhost:8000/api/posts/1 | jq { "post": { "id": 1, "title": "NewTitle", "body": "NewBody1", } }
}

Checking for errors when trying to update someone else's article

$ curl -X PATCH -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
-H "Authorization: Bearer xxxxxxxxxxxxxx" \}
-d '{"title": "NewTitle", "body": "NewBody1"}' \
http://localhost:8000/api/posts/2 -v

...
HTTP/1.1 403 Forbidden
...

Writing Tests

Handler tests that you can update your own articles, but not others'.

Update your own article

handler/post_test.go

func TestUpdatePostSuccess(t *testing.T) { setup() reqJSON := `{"title":"NewTitle", "body":"NewBody"}` authMiddleware := middleware.AuthMiddleware(h.authStore, h.userStore) req := httptest.NewRequest(echo.PATCH, "/api/posts/:id", strings.NewReader(reqJSON)) req.Header.Set(echo.HeaderContentType, echo.MIMEApplicationJSON) req.Header.Set(echo.HeaderAuthorization, "Bearer: ValidToken1") rec := httptest.NewRecorder() c := e.NewContext(req, rec) c.SetPath("/api/posts/:id") c.SetParamNames("id") c.SetParamValues("1") err := authMiddleware(func(c echo.Context) error { return h.updatePost(c) })(c) assert.NoError(t, err) if assert.Equal(t, http.StatusOK, rec.Code) { var res postResponse err := json.Unmarshal(rec.Body.Bytes(), &res) assert.NoError(t, err) assert.Equal(t, "NewTitle", res.Post.Title) assert.Equal(t, "NewBody", res.Post.Body) }
}

test returns a fixed user id by idToken for the conversion of idToken to Firebase user id, which is done by the authentication middleware.　Use the mock method prepared in base project.

func (f *fakeAuthClient) VerifyIDToken(context context.Context, token string) (*auth.Token, error) { var uid string if token == "ValidToken" { uid = "ValidUID" return &auth.Token{UID: uid}, nil } else if token == "ValidToken1" { uid = "ValidUID1" return &auth.Token{UID: uid}, nil } else { return nil, errors.New("Invalid Token") }
}

Trying to update someone else's article.

handler/post_test.go

func TestUpdatePostForbidden(t *testing.T) { setup() reqJSON := `{"title":"NewTitle", "body":"NewBody"}` authMiddleware := middleware.AuthMiddleware(h.authStore, h.userStore) req := httptest.NewRequest(echo.PATCH, "/api/posts/:id", strings.NewReader(reqJSON)) req.Header.Set(echo.HeaderContentType, echo.MIMEApplicationJSON) req.Header.Set(echo.HeaderAuthorization, "Bearer: ValidToken1") rec := httptest.NewRecorder() c := e.NewContext(req, rec) c.SetPath("/api/posts/:id") c.SetParamNames("id") c.SetParamValues("2") err := authMiddleware(func(c echo.Context) error { return h.updatePost(c) })(c) assert.NoError(t, err) assert.Equal(t, http.StatusForbidden, rec.Code)
}

test run

$ go test -run TestUpdatePostSuccess
・・・
ok go-echo-starter/handler 1.380s $ go test -run TestUpdatePostForbidden
・・・
ok      go-echo-starter/handler 1.380s

Conclusion

Sample we made this time
https://github.com/nrikiji/go-echo-sample/tree/blog-example

Items.Title: C++ 概念在行动 | C++ Concepts In Action
Items.Description:
模板元编程是一个复杂的话题，即使是经验丰富的老手也很难过。 我发现了这个特性的一个有趣用法，以确保我可以编写一个重载的流插入运算符，该运算符可以输出支持基于范围的迭代的 C++ 容器（基本上是具有 begin 和 end 方法的类型）。

 #include <iostream> #include <unordered_map> #include <array> #include <vector> using namespace std; template<typename ContainerType> concept SupportsRangeBasedFor = requires(ContainerType container) { container.begin(); container.end(); }; template<typename KeyType, typename ValueType> ostream& operator<<(ostream& os, const pair<KeyType, ValueType>& p) { os << p.first << "->" << p.second; return os; } ostream& operator<<(ostream& os, SupportsRangeBasedFor auto&& container) { os << "[ "; for (const auto& element : container) { os << element << ' '; } os << ']' << endl; return os; } int main() { cout << vector<int>{1,2,3} << endl; cout << array<int,3>{4,5,6} << endl; cout << unordered_map<int,int>{{8,9},{10,11},{11,12}} << endl; struct Foo {}; cout << Foo {} << endl; // Compiler Error: No overload for operator<< that accepts Foo return 0; }

运行这个程序会产生这个输出：

 ~/code/cpp/concepts > ./concept [ 1 2 3 ] [ 4 5 6 ] [ 11->12 10->11 8->9 ]

因此，我们有一个可以支持任何具有 begin 和 end 方法的容器的重载。 这不是魔法，你可以在没有SupportsRangeBasedFor概念的情况下让它工作，但魔法是这个概念阻止发生的事情：

如果没有对模板参数的约束，编译器会很乐意为Foo选择operator<<重载，并且由于Foo没有begin和end方法这一事实，您会得到一个难以理解的错误。 您将看到这种性质的错误：

 concept.cpp:22:30: error: invalid range expression of type 'Foo'; no viable 'begin' function available for (const auto& element : container) { ^ ~~~~~~~~~ concept.cpp:35:10: note: in instantiation of function template specialization 'operator<<<Foo>' requested here cout << Foo {} << endl;

不仅如此，编译器将匹配任何ostream.operator<<(...)调用此重载，因为模板参数将匹配所有类型。

该概念表达的类型约束明确禁止编译器为您不希望支持的类型选择模板函数。 这是一个非常简洁的功能，我希望在我未来的开发中广泛使用它来限制我的实现应该选择的类型:)



原文:

C++20 has a new feature called Concept that allows developers to specify constraints on template parameters. Template meta programming is a complex topic that stumps even seasoned veterans. I found an interesting usage of this feature to ensure that I can write an overloaded stream insertion operator that can output C++ containers that support range based iteration (basically types that have begin and end methods).

#include <iostream>
#include <unordered_map>
#include <array>
#include <vector>
using namespace std;

template<typename ContainerType>
concept SupportsRangeBasedFor = requires(ContainerType container) {
    container.begin();
    container.end();
};

template<typename KeyType, typename ValueType>
ostream& operator<<(ostream& os, const pair<KeyType, ValueType>& p) {
    os << p.first << "->" << p.second;
    return os;
}

ostream& operator<<(ostream& os, SupportsRangeBasedFor auto&& container) {
    os << "[ ";
    for (const auto& element : container) {
        os << element << ' ';
    }
    os << ']' << endl;
    return os;
}

int main()
{
    cout << vector<int>{1,2,3} << endl;
    cout << array<int,3>{4,5,6} << endl;
    cout << unordered_map<int,int>{{8,9},{10,11},{11,12}} << endl;
    struct Foo {};
    cout << Foo {} << endl; // Compiler Error: No overload for operator<< that accepts Foo
    return 0;
}

Running this program produces this output:

~/code/cpp/concepts > ./concept
[ 1 2 3 ]

[ 4 5 6 ]

[ 11->12 10->11 8->9 ]

So, we have a single overload that can support any container that has a begin and end method. This is not magic, you could have got this to work without SupportsRangeBasedFor concept, but the magic is what the concept prevents from happening:

Without the constraint on the template parameter, compiler would have happily chosen operator<< overload for Foo and you would get an indecipherable blob of errors caused by the fact that Foo doesn't have begin and end methods. You will see errors of this nature:

concept.cpp:22:30: error: invalid range expression of type 'Foo'; no viable 'begin' function available
    for (const auto& element : container) {
                             ^ ~~~~~~~~~
concept.cpp:35:10: note: in instantiation of function template specialization 'operator<<<Foo>' requested here
    cout << Foo {} << endl;

Not only that, the compiler would match any ostream.operator<<(...) call to this overload because the template parameter will match all types.

The type constraint expressed by the concept explicitly forbids the compiler from picking up your template function for types that you don't wish to support. This is a pretty neat feature and I hope to be using this quite widely in my future development to limit the types that my implementation should be chosen for :)

Items.Title: [JP] go-retry - Go で处理をからリトライできるパッケージを作った | [JP] go-retry - Go で処理を途中からリトライできるパッケージを作った
Items.Description:
この记事は2021年11月にzenn.devで公开されたものです。

なぜ作ったのか

通信处理やインストール处理など、一连のを Step by step に実行してステップ毎にリトライさせることがあったので、その実装をパッケージとしたて切り。

最初はがさされるまでリトライリトライするの実装でしでしでしが，さすがさすがさすがさすがにに现在现在现在现在现在现在はははははははははははははははははははははははははははははは

使い方

使い方はretry.DoWithContextにリトライ间歇を设定するretry.DurationFuncを设定し、あとは実行したいをステップ毎に数化して渡すだけです。

 package main import ( "context" "log" "github.com/kenkyu392/go-retry" ) func main () { // キャンセル用にコンテキストを用意する。 ctx , cancel := context . WithCancel ( context . Background ()) defer cancel () // 処理を実行する。 errs := retry . DoWithContext ( ctx , // Exponential Backoff を行いながら 5 回リトライする。 retry . ExponentialBackoff ( 5 ), // 実行したい処理をステップ毎に関数に分離して渡す。 func ( ctx context . Context ) error { // リトライ不可能な何かが発生した場合は// retry.Canceled で処理をキャンセルする。 if failed { return retry . Canceled } return nil }, // 前のステップが成功したら次のステップに進む。 func ( ctx context . Context ) error { return nil }, ) // 実行中に発生したエラーを全て確認する。 for _ , err := range errs { log . Print ( err ) } }

指数退避 とは？

简単说明と处理の回数に合わせてリトライ间隔关数关数的的にに长く长く长くするするアルゴリズムです。。リトライリトライ间隔间隔をを长く长くするすることことのの必要必要必要必要性など详しく调べる调べる调べる调べるとしては「处理の冲突を避けるため」や「负担を軽减するため」に実装することが多いと思います。

リトライ间歇の调整

リトライ间歇の调整にはretry.DurationFuncを使用します。现在このパッケージには标准的なretry.ExponentialBackoffとretry.Durationが実装されています。

间隔调整关数にし理由は，単纯単纯にカスタムににするするするのののががががが好き好きななこともももありありますますががががretry.ExponentialBackoff返回200ms + (20ms ~ 100ms)ののランダム値値を使用たアルゴリズムでで実装されれていいますますますがが，，ランダムランダムななな値値値をををを使用使用使用し使用使用使用使用使用使用使用使用使用使用使用使用使用使用使用使用使用使用使用使用使用使用使用で简単に使用できます。

 func ExponentialBackoff ( maxRetries int ) retry . DurationFunc { return func ( retries int ) time . Duration { if maxRetries >= 0 && maxRetries < retries { return - 1 } return time . Duration ( math . Pow ( 2 , float64 ( retries )) * 100 ) * time . Millisecond } }

まとめ

パッケージはや处理，データベースなどの他にののインターフェースインターフェースインターフェースを伴う伴う伴う伴う伴う伴う伴うなどなどなどなどなどなど使用できるようようににに设计设计ししてて実装実装実装ししてていてててなななてみてください。

retry.DurationFuncの追加やご指摘などコントリビュートもお待ちしてます。 retry.DurationFuncの追加やご指摘などコントリビュートもお待ちしてます。



原文:

この記事は2021年11月に zenn.dev で公開されたものです。

なぜ作ったのか

通信処理やインストール処理など、一連の処理を Step by step に実行してステップ毎にリトライさせることがあったので、その実装をパッケージとして切り出してみました。

https://github.com/kenkyu392/go-retry

最初はとりあえずコンテキストがキャンセルされるまでリトライするだけの実装でしたが、さすがに現在は Exponential Backoff や最大リトライ回数など最低限必要なものを実装しています。

使い方

使い方は retry.DoWithContext にリトライ間隔を設定する retry.DurationFunc を設定し、あとは実行したい処理をステップ毎に関数化して渡すだけです。

package main import ( "context" "log" "github.com/kenkyu392/go-retry"
) func main() { // キャンセル用にコンテキストを用意する。 ctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background()) defer cancel() // 処理を実行する。 errs := retry.DoWithContext(ctx, // Exponential Backoff を行いながら 5 回リトライする。 retry.ExponentialBackoff(5), // 実行したい処理をステップ毎に関数に分離して渡す。 func(ctx context.Context) error { // リトライ不可能な何かが発生した場合は // retry.Canceled で処理をキャンセルする。 if failed { return retry.Canceled } return nil }, // 前のステップが成功したら次のステップに進む。 func(ctx context.Context) error { return nil }, ) // 実行中に発生したエラーを全て確認する。 for _, err := range errs { log.Print(err) }
}

Exponential Backoff とは？

簡単に説明すると、処理の失敗回数に合わせてリトライ間隔を指数関数的に長くするアルゴリズムです。リトライ間隔を長くすることの必要性などは詳しく調べると良い説明が出てくると思いますが、用途としては「処理の衝突を避けるため」や「負荷を軽減するため」に実装することが多いと思います。

https://cloud.google.com/iot/docs/how-tos/exponential-backoff

https://docs.aws.amazon.com/general/latest/gr/api-retries.html

リトライ間隔の調整

リトライ間隔の調整には retry.DurationFunc を使用します。現在このパッケージには標準的な retry.ExponentialBackoff と retry.Duration が実装されています。

リトライ間隔の調整を関数にした理由は、単純にカスタムできる実装にするのが好きなこともありますが、Exponential Backoff には様々な実装があることが大きいです。例えば、現在実装されている retry.ExponentialBackoff は 200ms + (20ms ~ 100ms) のようにランダムな値を使用したアルゴリズムで実装されていますが、ランダムな値を使用しない Exponential Backoff を使用したい場合は、以下のような独自関数を実装することで簡単に使用できます。

func ExponentialBackoff(maxRetries int) retry.DurationFunc { return func(retries int) time.Duration { if maxRetries >= 0 && maxRetries < retries { return -1 } return time.Duration(math.Pow(2, float64(retries))*100)*time.Millisecond }
}

まとめ

このパッケージは通信処理やインストール処理、データベースなどの他に対話型のインターフェースを伴う CLI などで使用できるように設計して実装しています。いろいろな場所に組み込みやすい設計にしているので、良ければ使ってみてください。

retry.DurationFunc の追加やご指摘などコントリビュートもお待ちしてます。

Items.Title: 在 React App 中使用 Firebase 进行身份验证。 🤺🔥 🤺🔥 | Authentication Using Firebase in React App. 🤺🔥
Items.Description:
库纳尔阿格拉瓦尔

发表于在本文中，我们将了解如何在您的 Web 应用程序中对用户进行身份验证。 对于本文，我使用的是 google 身份验证。
跟随....

创建 Firebase 项目

这很简单，只需在firebase中使用您的 google 帐户登录，创建一个新项目。

在该项目中，转到身份验证选项卡。

点击登录方式
转到添加新提供商，选择 Google。

现在，您需要在项目中创建一个 Web 应用程序


复制配置文件。 现在，打开你最喜欢的 IDE 并创建一个 React 项目。

在src文件夹中创建一个文件名 fb.config.js / .ts


另外，不要忘记安装firebase。

我们使用上下文在我们的应用程序中使用用户身份验证状态。 创建一个 authContext.tsx 文件。

 import { createContext , ReactComponentElement , ReactElement , useContext , useEffect , useState } from ' react ' import { User , GoogleAuthProvider , signInWithPopup , signOut , onAuthStateChanged } from " firebase/auth " import { auth , app } from " ./fb.config " interface value { user : User | null , logInUser : () => void , logOutUser : () => void , } const AuthCont = createContext < User | null > ( null ) export const useAuthContext = () => { return useContext ( AuthCont ) } export default function authContext ({ children }: { children : ReactElement }) { const [ user , setUser ] = useState < null | User > ( null ) useEffect (() => { onAuthStateChanged ( auth , ( user ) => { setUser ( user ) }) }, []) const logInUser = () => { const provider = new GoogleAuthProvider () signInWithPopup ( auth , provider ) . then (( res ) => { setUser ( res . user ) }) . catch (( err ) => { console . log ( err ) }) } const logOutUser = () => { signOut ( auth ) setUser ( null ) } const value = { user , logInUser , logOutUser } return ( < AuthCont . Provider value = { user } > { children } </ AuthCont . Provider > ) }

现在我们只需要将它放在我们的 app.tsx 之上，然后我们就可以在任何子组件中使用它。 转到 main.tsx 文件并输入此代码。

 import React from ' react ' import ReactDOM from ' react-dom/client ' import App from ' ./App ' import ' ./index.css ' import AuthProvider from " ./authContext " ReactDOM . createRoot ( document . getElementById ( ' root ' ) ! ). render ( < React . StrictMode > < AuthProvider > < App /> </ AuthProvider > </ React . StrictMode > )


原文:

Kunal Agrawal

Posted on May 15

In this article we will know how to authenticate users, in your web app. For this article I'm using google authentication.
Follow....

Create a Firebase Project

It's simple, just login with your google account in firebase, create a new project.

In that project go to Authentication's tab.

Click on Sign-in method
Go to Add New Provider, select Google.

Now, you need to create a web app in your project


Copy the configuration file. Now, open your fav IDE and create a React Project.

In src folder create a file name fb.config.js / .ts


also, don't forget to install firebase.

we're using context to use state of user authentication in our app. create a authContext.tsx file.

import { createContext, ReactComponentElement, ReactElement, useContext, useEffect, useState } from 'react'
import { User, GoogleAuthProvider, signInWithPopup, signOut, onAuthStateChanged } from "firebase/auth"
import { auth, app } from "./fb.config" interface value { user: User | null, logInUser: () => void, logOutUser: () => void,
} const AuthCont = createContext<User | null>(null) export const useAuthContext = () => { return useContext(AuthCont)
} export default function authContext({ children }: { children: ReactElement }) { const [user, setUser] = useState<null | User>(null) useEffect(() => { onAuthStateChanged(auth, (user) => { setUser(user) }) }, []) const logInUser = () => { const provider = new GoogleAuthProvider() signInWithPopup(auth, provider) .then((res) => { setUser(res.user) }) .catch((err) => { console.log(err) }) } const logOutUser = () => { signOut(auth) setUser(null) } const value = { user, logInUser, logOutUser } return ( <AuthCont.Provider value={user}> {children} </AuthCont.Provider> )
}

Now we just need to put this on top of our app.tsx, then we can use it in any child component. Go to main.tsx file and put this code.

import React from 'react'
import ReactDOM from 'react-dom/client'
import App from './App'
import './index.css'
import AuthProvider from "./authContext" ReactDOM.createRoot(document.getElementById('root')!).render( <React.StrictMode> <AuthProvider> <App /> </AuthProvider> </React.StrictMode>
)

Items.Title: Python IN 浏览器 | Python IN Browser
Items.Description:
阿南杜·普拉卡什

发表于浏览器中的 Python！ 输出：

只是在开玩笑！ 没有安装 pyscript。 只需将这些命令添加到您的 html 页面。

 <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://pyscript.net/alpha/pyscript.css" /> <script defer src="https://pyscript.net/alpha/pyscript.js"></script> <py-script> print("Hello World!!!")#Your Python Code </py-script>

注意 Py-Script 仍处于 Alpha 版本。



原文:

Anandhu Prakash

Posted on May 15

Python in the browser! PyScript is a framework that allows users to create rich Python applications in the browser using HTML's interface and the power of Pyodide, WASM, and modern web technologies. The PyScript framework provides users at every experience level with access to an expressive, easy-to-learn programming language with countless applications.

Output:

Installation of PyScript:

Just Kidding! There is no installation for pyscript. Just add these commands to your html page.


<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://pyscript.net/alpha/pyscript.css" />
<script defer src="https://pyscript.net/alpha/pyscript.js"></script>

<py-script>
    print("Hello World!!!")#Your Python Code
</py-script>

Note Py-Script is still in Alpha Version.

Items.Title: 具有 Angular 动画、异步管道和 RxJS 的 BehaviorSubject 的自定义和可重用 Toast 组件 | Custom & Reusable Toast Component with Angular Animations, Async Pipe, and RxJS' BehaviorSubject
Items.Description:
• 创建一个 toast 组件，该组件根据输入的“状态”显示不同的样式
  • 从应用程序中的任何位置以及任何其他父组件触发组件
  1. 为组件设置样式- 我们将为组件本身设置样式，并在此过程中重新审视条件样式的概念（利用 Angular 的内置指令）
  2. 创建 Toast 服务- 我们将创建在需要触发和填充 toast 时由其他服务或组件调用的实际服务
  3. 双向绑定组件- 然后我们将对组件进行调整，以便 toast 服务可以访问其条件变量/属性

创建组件并设置样式

首先，通过运行在终端中创建新组件：

 $ ng gc components/ui/toast --skip-tests

全球访问

要从应用程序中的任何位置访问此组件，请将其添加到app.component.html文件中。 我们创建的服务将确保在我们调用它之前它不会出现。

 <!--in the app.component.html file-->﻿<app-toast></app-toast> <!--This is the selector for the toast component--> ﻿<router-outlet></router-outlet>

我们希望 toast 出现在应用程序中的每个项目的前面。 但有时，应用程序会感到困惑。 要解决此问题，您只需在styles.scss文件中添加（并跟踪）您的 z 索引项目。 注意：为确保这始终有效，不要忘记添加您最终为元素创建的父类！

 // style.scss app-root { z-index : 1 ; } app-toast , .toast-class { z-index : 2 ; }

我们将使用 *ngIf 指令创建一个 div。 这使得 toast 不会出现，除非属性showsToast为true 。 接下来我们将把这个属性添加到组件文件中。
  • 条件样式通常围绕添加或删除一个类（根据我的经验）。 因此，一个元素可能会以某种方式设置样式，并且当给定不同的条件时会添加新样式（可能会抵消以前的样式）。

    我认为很多人都不知道的一个很棒的功能是占位符选择器！ 如果您不了解它们，可以在此处阅读它们。

    在这个例子中，随意使用我在 npm 上的 SCSS 包，因为这是我为保持高水平所做的事情！ 我只会在这个例子中使用它作为颜色。

    运行$ npm install @riapacheco/yutes （更多说明在 npm 页面上）

    然后，将其添加到 toast 组件的 SCSS 文件中：

     // toast.component.scss @import '~@riapacheco/yutes/combos.scss' ; %default-toast { // You indicate a placeholder selected with a preceding '%' position : absolute ; top : 0 ; right : 0rem ; margin : 2rem ; display : inline-flex ; min-width : 260px ; min-height : 70px ; max-height : 70px ; box-shadow : 6px 6px 12px #000000 40 ; flex-flow : row nowrap ; align-items : center ; justify-content : flex-start ; border-left : 6px solid black ; padding : 1 .5rem ; border-radius : 4px ; font-size : 0 .9rem ; } // Default toast .toast-class { @extend %default-toast ; // You then add the styles to another selector with the @extend decorator } // Now we can make our state-specific classes // Success .success-toast { @extend %default-toast ; border-left : 6px solid $success ; } // Warning .warning-toast { @extend %default-toast ; border-left : 6px solid $warning ; } // Danger .danger-toast { @extend %default-toast ; border-left : 6px solid $danger ; }

    您的默认吐司如下所示：

    如果您将元素上的类从toast-class更改为warning-toast ，它将如下所示：

    将数组绑定为类

    现在您看到了组件如何随不同的类发生变化，我们可以使用 binding []将类属性绑定到模板（可以从组件内部更改）。

     // toast.component.ts import { Component , OnInit } from ' @angular/core ' ; @ Component ({ selector : ' app-toast ' , templateUrl : ' ./toast.component.html ' , styleUrls : [ ' ./toast.component.scss ' ] }) export class ToastComponent implements OnInit { toastClass = [ ' toast-class ' ]; // Class lists can be added as an array toastMessage = ' This is a toast ' ; showsToast = true ; constructor () { } ngOnInit (): void { } }
     <!--toast.component.html-->﻿<div *ngIf= "showsToast" [class]= "toastClass" > <!--We bind it by surrounding 'class' with square-brackets and referencing the property from the template--> ﻿<div style= "max-width: 160px;" > {{ toastMessage }} </div> <a class= "close-btn" (click)= "showsToast = !showsToast" > <small> Dismiss </small> </a> </div>

    向模板添加角度动画

    要从头开始添加动画，请将 Angular 核心包中的 BrowserAnimationsModule 添加到 app.module.ts 文件中，如下所示：

     @ import { BrowserAnimationsModule } from ' @angular/platform-browser/animations ' ; @ NgModule ({ declarations : [ AppComponent , ToastComponent ], imports : [ BrowserAnimationsModule , CommonModule ], providers : [], bootstrap : [ AppComponent ] }) export class AppModule { }

    然后在toast.component.html文件中，我们可以添加动画触发器，告诉应用我们将使用动画规范定义哪个元素。 由于它有一个条件触发器，我们不再需要我们之前添加的 *ngIf 指令。 动画需要使用[@<name>]命名的触发器。 然后将其绑定到我们之前创建的条件属性，但现在后面是三元运算符。 所以showsToast ? 'open' : 'close' 我们现在将在组件本身中定义动画状态和样式。

    将动画语法添加到组件文件

    首先，我们必须将我们将使用的动画的不同元素导入到组件中。 您可以从Angular 的文档中了解有关这些触发器的更多信息。

     import { Component , OnInit } from ' @angular/core ' ; // import this ⤵ import { animate , state , style , transition , trigger } from ' @angular/animations ' ; @ Component ({ selector : ' app-toast ' , templateUrl : ' ./toast.component.html ' , styleUrls : [ ' ./toast.component.scss ' ], // And then these ⤵ animations : [ trigger ( ' toastTrigger ' , [ // This refers to the @trigger we created in the template state ( ' open ' , style ({ transform : ' translateY(0%) ' })), // This is how the 'open' state is styled state ( ' close ' , style ({ transform : ' translateY(-200%) ' })), // This is how the 'close' state is styled transition ( ' open <=> close ' , [ // This is how they're expected to transition from one to the other animate ( ' 300ms ease-in-out ' ) ]) ]) ] }) export class ToastComponent implements OnInit { toastClass = [ ' toast-class ' ]; toastMessage = ' This is a toast ' ; showsToast = true ; constructor () { } ngOnInit (): void { } }

    您可以通过将 showsToast 属性更改为 false 并添加setTimeout()函数以在 1000 毫秒（1 秒）后将属性更改为true来测试动画是否有效：

     export class ToastComponent implements OnInit { toastClass = [ ' toast-class ' ]; toastMessage = ' This is a toast ' ; showsToast = true ; constructor () { } ngOnInit (): void { setTimeout (() => { this . showsToast = true ; }, 1000 ); } }

    在终端中运行$ ng serve并等待 toast 出现！

    所以现在我们需要有一些东西来触发服务！

    一个类（ string ），它可以是success-toast 、 warning-toast或danger-toast 。

  • 绑定到toastMessage以便显示消息的消息（ string ）

    • 创建 Toast 服务

    在终端中使用以下命令添加服务

    添加状态变量

    在 toast.service 文件中，我们将首先添加一个constant ，将我们的 toast 状态定义为字符串。 这些字符串将是传递给组件的内容，因此与我们之前创建的类（例如 success-toast）相匹配。 这将有助于检查事情并更容易从应用程序中的任何位置引用状态（无需重新访问它们被调用的内容或输入特定的字符串

    import { Injectable } from ' @angular/core ' ; // Add this constant ⤵ export const TOAST_STATE = { success : ' success-toast ' , warning : ' warning-toast ' , danger : ' danger-toast ' }; @ Injectable ({ providedIn : ' root ' }) export class ToastService { constructor () { } }

    使用异步管道访问服务的 BehaviorSubjects

    如果服务/提供者的 observable 是公共的，则不必从组件内部手动订阅 observable，您可以直接从模板内部访问 observable 中的内容。

    将 observable 想象成一个数据流，然后您可以观察并使其出现在不同的地方。

    因此，我们将使用BehaviorSubjects ，因为您最初可以存储默认属性。

     // toast.service.ts﻿export class ToastService { // The boolean that drives the toast's 'open' vs. 'close' behavior﻿public showsToast$ : BehaviorSubject < boolean > = new BehaviorSubject < boolean > ( false ); // The message string that'll bind and display on the toast ﻿. public toastMessage$ : BehaviorSubject < string > = new BehaviorSubject < string > ( ' Default Toast Message ' ); // The state that will add a style class to the component ﻿. public toastState$ : BehaviorSubject < string > = new BehaviorSubject < string > ( TOAST_STATE . success ); constructor () { } }

    现在我们将添加两个方法来触发组件并使用不同的数据填充 BehaviorSubjects。

    1. 一个dismissToast()表示toast 恢复为false
     // toast.service.ts﻿export class ToastService { public showsToast$ : BehaviorSubject < boolean > = new BehaviorSubject < boolean > ( false ); public toastMessage$ : BehaviorSubject < string > = new BehaviorSubject < string > ( ' Default Toast Message ' ); public toastState$ : BehaviorSubject < string > = new BehaviorSubject < string > ( TOAST_STATE . success ); constructor () { } showToast ( toastState : string , toastMsg : string ): void { // Observables use '.next()' to indicate what they want done with observable // This will update the toastState to the toastState passed into the function ﻿this . toastState$ . next ( toastState ); // This updates the toastMessage to the toastMsg passed into the function ﻿this . toastMessage$ . next ( toastMsg ); // This will update the showsToast trigger to 'true' this . showsToast$ . next ( true ); } // This updates the showsToast behavioursubject to 'false' dismissToast (): void { this . showsToast$ . next ( false ); } }

    双向绑定组件

    现在我们可以回到 toast 组件，将模板中的变量替换为组件中的 observables。

    1. 在组件本身中，由于我们在服务中定义和存储我们的值，我们可以从组件属性中删除值并用它们的类型替换它们。
    2. 我们想将 toast.service 作为构造函数中的“公共”注入
    3. 我们将要添加一个dismiss()方法，该方法可以调用组件内的toast.service 并访问其dismissToast()方法
    import { ToastService } from ' src/app/services/toast.service ' ; export class ToastComponent implements OnInit { // Change the default values to types toastClass : string []; toastMessage : string ; showsToast : boolean ; constructor ( public toast : ToastService ) { } // We inject the toast.service here as 'public' ngOnInit (): void { } // We'll add this to the dismiss button in the template dismiss (): void { this . toast . dismissToast (); } }

    在模板中使用异步管道

    要使用异步管道，您只需将服务添加为对象，后跟您正在访问的可观察名称； 并关注那些| async 测试它！

    由于行为主体可以保存初始值，我们可以通过将默认的showsToast$值更改为 true 并将您想要的任何其他值添加到其他值来测试 toast！

     export class ToastService { public showsToast$ : BehaviorSubject < boolean > = new BehaviorSubject < boolean > ( true ); public toastMessage$ : BehaviorSubject < string > = new BehaviorSubject < string > ( ' This is a test message! ' ); public toastState$ : BehaviorSubject < string > = new BehaviorSubject < string > ( TOAST_STATE . danger ); constructor () { } // .. more code }

    结论

    这是很多 - 但它也是我希望在我知道这一切之前阅读的文章。 我们经历了分离服务、动画、scss 样式等的想法。

    现在，当您完成需要触发 toast 的过程时，您可以调用 toast 出现（甚至可能添加一个setTimeout来关闭它！）。 这是标准 Firebase 用户身份验证服务中的示例：

     export class AuthService { constructor ( private fireAuth : AngularFireAuth , private toast : ToastService ) {} registerUser ( email : string , password : string ): void { this . fireAuth . createUserWithEmailAndPassword ( email , password ) . then ( res => { this . toast . showToast ( TOAST_STATE . success , ' You have successfully registered! ' ); this . dismissError (); console . log ( ' Registered ' , res ); }) . catch ( error => { this . toast . showToast ( TOAST_STATE . danger , ' Something went wrong, could not register ' ); this . dismissError (); console . log ( ' Something went wrong ' , error . message ); }); } private dismissError (): void { setTimeout (() => { this . toast . dismissToast (); }, 2000 ); } }

    就是这样。 就这样。

    里亚



    原文:
    • Create a toast component that shows different styles based on a "state" it's fed
    • Trigger the component from anywhere in the app and by any other parent component
    1. Style the Component - we'll style the component itself and in doing so, revisit concepts for conditional styling (utilizing Angular's built-in directives)
    2. Create the Toast Service - We'll create the actual service that will be called on by other services or components when needing to trigger and populate the toast
    3. Two-Way Bind the Component - We'll then make adjustments to the component so that its conditional variables / properties can be accessed by the toast service

    Creating and Styling the Component
    Toast Setup and Initial Data Binding
    Adding SCSS Styles
    Binding an Array as a Class
    Adding Angular Animations to the Template
    Adding Animation Syntax to the Component File
    Creating the Toast Service
    Accessing Service's BehaviorSubjects with the Async Pipe
    Two-Way Bind the Component
    Using the Async Pipe in the Template

    Creating and Styling the Component

    First, create new component in the terminal by running:

     $ ng g c components/ui/toast --skip-tests

    (the --skip-tests flag just keeps the cli from generating test files along with components)

    Global Access

    To access this component from anywhere in the app, add it to the app.component.html file. The service we create will ensure that it doesn't show up until we call it.

    <!--in the app.component.html file-->
﻿<app-toast></app-toast> <!--This is the selector for the toast component--> ﻿<router-outlet></router-outlet>

    Quick tip for Z-Index

    We want the toast to appear in front of every item in the app. But sometimes, the app gets confused. To fix this, you can simply add (and keep track) of your z-indexed items in the styles.scss file. Note: to ensure this consistently works, don't forget to add the parent class you end up creating for the element too!

    // style.scss app-root { z-index: 1; } app-toast, .toast-class { z-index: 2; }

    Toast Setup and Initial Data Binding

    • We'll create a div with an *ngIf directive. This makes it so the toast doesn't appear unless the property showsToast is true. We'll add this property to the component file next.
    • The {{ toastMessage }} string is binding a message string assigned to the toastMessage property that we'll also find in the component file next! 
    <!--toast.component.html-->
﻿<div *ngIf="showsToast" class="toast-class"> <div style="max-width: 160px;"> {{ toastMessage }} </div> <!--button--> <a class="close-btn" (click)="showsToast = !showsToast"> <small> Dismiss </small> </a>
</div>

    // toast.component.ts
import { Component, OnInit } from '@angular/core'; @Component({ selector: 'app-toast', templateUrl: './toast.component.html', styleUrls: ['./toast.component.scss']
}) export class ToastComponent implements OnInit { toastMessage = 'This is a toast'; // This is the string the template is already bound to  showsToast = true; // This is what toggles the component to show or hide ﻿ constructor() { } ngOnInit(): void { }
}

    Conditional styles usually revolves around adding or removing a class (in my experience). So, an element might be styled a certain way, and when given a different condition will add new styles (that might cancel out former ones).

    An awesome feature that I don't think many people know about are placeholder selectors! If you don't know about them, you can read about them here.

    Feel free to use my SCSS package on npm for this example, as this is what I'm doing to keep things high-level! I'm only going to use it for this example here for colors.

    Run $ npm install @riapacheco/yutes (more instruction is on the npm page)

    Then, add this to the toast component's SCSS file:

    // toast.component.scss
@import '~@riapacheco/yutes/combos.scss'; %default-toast { // You indicate a placeholder selected with a preceding '%' position: absolute; top: 0; right: 0rem; margin: 2rem; display: inline-flex; min-width: 260px; min-height: 70px; max-height: 70px; box-shadow: 6px 6px 12px #00000040; flex-flow: row nowrap; align-items: center; justify-content: flex-start; border-left: 6px solid black; padding: 1.5rem; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 0.9rem;
} // Default toast
.toast-class { @extend %default-toast; // You then add the styles to another selector with the @extend decorator
} // Now we can make our state-specific classes // Success
.success-toast { @extend %default-toast; border-left: 6px solid $success;
} // Warning
.warning-toast { @extend %default-toast; border-left: 6px solid $warning;
} // Danger
.danger-toast { @extend %default-toast; border-left: 6px solid $danger;
}

    Your default toast looks like this:

    And if you change the class on the element from toast-class to warning-toast, it will look like this:

    Binding an Array as a Class

    Now that you see how the component changes with a different class, we can use binding [] to bind a class property to the template (that can change from inside the component).

    // toast.component.ts
import { Component, OnInit } from '@angular/core'; @Component({ selector: 'app-toast', templateUrl: './toast.component.html', styleUrls: ['./toast.component.scss']
}) export class ToastComponent implements OnInit { toastClass = ['toast-class']; // Class lists can be added as an array  toastMessage = 'This is a toast'; showsToast = true; constructor() { } ngOnInit(): void { }
}

    <!--toast.component.html-->
﻿<div *ngIf="showsToast" [class]="toastClass"> <!--We bind it by surrounding 'class' with square-brackets and referencing the property from the template--> ﻿ <div style="max-width: 160px;"> {{ toastMessage }} </div> <a class="close-btn" (click)="showsToast = !showsToast"> <small> Dismiss </small> </a>
</div>

    Adding Angular Animations to the Template

    To add animations from scratch, you add the BrowserAnimationsModule from angular's core package to your app.module.ts file like so:

    @import { BrowserAnimationsModule } from '@angular/platform-browser/animations'; @NgModule({ declarations: [ AppComponent, ToastComponent ], imports: [ BrowserAnimationsModule, CommonModule ], providers: [], bootstrap: [ AppComponent ]
}) export class AppModule { }

    Then in the toast.component.html file, we can add the animation trigger that tells the app which element we'll define with animation specs. Since it has a conditional trigger baked in, we no longer need the *ngIf directive that we added earlier. (cool, eh?)

    <!--toast.component.html-->
<div [@toastTrigger]="showsToast ? 'open' : 'close'" [class]="toastClass"> <div style="max-width: 160px;"> {{ toastMessage }} </div> <a class="close-btn" (click)="showsToast = !showsToast"> <small> Dismiss </small> </a>
</div>

    Animations require a trigger that you name with [@<name>]. This is then bound to the conditional property we created earlier, but now followed by a ternary operator. So showsToast ? 'open' : 'close' really means: if the property showsToast is true, then use open as the animation state... else use close. We'll now define the animations states and styles in the component itself.

    Adding Animation Syntax to the Component File

    First, we have to import, into the component, the different elements of the animation we'll be using. You can learn more about these triggers from angular's documentation.

    import { Component, OnInit } from '@angular/core';
// import this ⤵
import { animate, state, style, transition, trigger } from '@angular/animations'; @Component({ selector: 'app-toast', templateUrl: './toast.component.html', styleUrls: ['./toast.component.scss'], // And then these ⤵ animations: [ trigger('toastTrigger', [ // This refers to the @trigger we created in the template  state('open', style({ transform: 'translateY(0%)' })), // This is how the 'open' state is styled  state('close', style({ transform: 'translateY(-200%)' })), // This is how the 'close' state is styled  transition('open <=> close', [ // This is how they're expected to transition from one to the other  animate('300ms ease-in-out') ]) ]) ]
}) export class ToastComponent implements OnInit { toastClass = ['toast-class']; toastMessage = 'This is a toast'; showsToast = true; constructor() { } ngOnInit(): void { }
}

    You can test to see if the animation works by changing the showsToast property to false, and adding a setTimeout() function to change the property to true after 1000ms (1 second):

    export class ToastComponent implements OnInit { toastClass = ['toast-class']; toastMessage = 'This is a toast'; showsToast = true; constructor() { } ngOnInit(): void { setTimeout(() => { this.showsToast = true; }, 1000); }
}

    Run $ ng serve in your terminal and wait a second for the toast to appear!

    So now we need to have something trigger the service!

    3 Things to Remember

    The toast component needs three inputs:

    1. A class (string) that's either success-toast, warning-toast, or danger-toast.
    2. A boolean result for showsToast to either or show (true) or hide (false) which impacts the animation
    3. A message (string) that binds to the toastMessage so that the message will display

    Creating the Toast Service

    Add the service with the following command in your terminal

    (Don't forget to add the service to the providers: [] array in your app.module.ts file!

    Adding State Variables

    In the toast.service file, we'll first add a constant that defines our toast states as strings. These strings will be what's passed to the component and thus match the classes (e.g. success-toast) that we made earlier. This will help keep things in check and make it easier to refer to the states from anywhere in the app (without having to go revisit what they're called or type out a specific string

    import { Injectable } from '@angular/core'; // Add this constant ⤵
export const TOAST_STATE = { success: 'success-toast', warning: 'warning-toast', danger: 'danger-toast'
}; @Injectable({ providedIn: 'root'
}) export class ToastService { constructor() { }
}

    Accessing Service's BehaviorSubjects with the Async Pipe

    A super handy feature that comes with Angular is its async pipe. Instead of having to subscribe manually to an observable from inside a component, if the service/provider's observable is public, you can get access to what's in the observable from directly inside the template.

    Think of an observable as a stream of data that you can then watch and make appear in different places.

    Angular often uses the RxJS library (comes with react) for handling state management. So we'll be using BehaviorSubjects since you can store default properties initially.

    // toast.service.ts﻿ export class ToastService { // The boolean that drives the toast's 'open' vs. 'close' behavior  ﻿public showsToast$: BehaviorSubject<boolean> = new BehaviorSubject<boolean>(false); // The message string that'll bind and display on the toast ﻿.  public toastMessage$: BehaviorSubject<string> = new BehaviorSubject<string>('Default Toast Message'); // The state that will add a style class to the component ﻿.  public toastState$: BehaviorSubject<string> = new BehaviorSubject<string>(TOAST_STATE.success); constructor() { }
}

    Now we'll add two methods to trigger the component and populate the BehaviorSubjects with different data.

    1. A showToast() method will trigger the toast and pass through it the toast state and toast message string (it will be assumed that if the function is called, the toast will want to be opened)
    2. A dismissToast() to indicate that the toast is back to false 
    // toast.service.ts﻿ export class ToastService { public showsToast$: BehaviorSubject<boolean> = new BehaviorSubject<boolean>(false); public toastMessage$: BehaviorSubject<string> = new BehaviorSubject<string>('Default Toast Message'); public toastState$: BehaviorSubject<string> = new BehaviorSubject<string>(TOAST_STATE.success); constructor() { } showToast(toastState: string, toastMsg: string): void { // Observables use '.next()' to indicate what they want done with observable  // This will update the toastState to the toastState passed into the function ﻿ this.toastState$.next(toastState); // This updates the toastMessage to the toastMsg passed into the function ﻿ this.toastMessage$.next(toastMsg); // This will update the showsToast trigger to 'true' this.showsToast$.next(true); } // This updates the showsToast behavioursubject to 'false'  dismissToast(): void { this.showsToast$.next(false); }
}

    Two-Way Bind the Component

    Now we can go back to the toast component and replace the variables in the template with the observables we have in the component.

    1. In the component itself, since we define and store our values in the service, we can remove the values from the component properties and replace them with their types.
    2. We want to inject the toast.service as a 'public' injectable within the constructor
    3. We'll want to add a dismiss() method that can call on the toast.service within the component and access its dismissToast() method 
    import { ToastService } from 'src/app/services/toast.service'; export class ToastComponent implements OnInit { // Change the default values to types  toastClass: string[]; toastMessage: string; showsToast: boolean; constructor(public toast: ToastService ) { } // We inject the toast.service here as 'public'  ngOnInit(): void { } // We'll add this to the dismiss button in the template  dismiss(): void { this.toast.dismissToast(); }
}

    Using the Async Pipe in the Template

    To use the async pipe, you just have to add the service as an object followed by the observable name you're accessing; and follow those with | async.

    <!--We canged the toastTrigger and class-->
<div [@toastTrigger]="(toast.showsToast$ | async) ? 'open' : 'close'" [class]="toast.toastState$ | async"> ﻿ <div style="max-width: 160px;"> <!--We access the toastMessage$ observable in the service--> {{ toast.toastMessage$ | async }} </div> <a class="close-btn" (click)="dismiss()"> <small> Dismiss </small> </a>
</div>

    Test it!

    Since behavior subjects can hold initial values, we can test the toast by changing the default showsToast$ value to true and adding whatever else you want to the other values!

    export class ToastService { public showsToast$: BehaviorSubject<boolean> = new BehaviorSubject<boolean>(true); public toastMessage$: BehaviorSubject<string> = new BehaviorSubject<string>('This is a test message!'); public toastState$: BehaviorSubject<string> = new BehaviorSubject<string>(TOAST_STATE.danger); constructor() { } // .. more code
}

    Conclusion

    This was a lot -- but it's also the article I wish I read before I knew all this. We walked through the idea of services being separated, animations, scss styling, and more.

    Now, when you're completing a process that needs a toast triggered, you can call on the toast to appear (and maybe even add a setTimeout to dismiss it!). Here's an example in a standard firebase user auth service:

    export class AuthService { constructor( private fireAuth: AngularFireAuth, private toast: ToastService ) {} registerUser(email: string, password: string): void { this.fireAuth.createUserWithEmailAndPassword(email, password) .then(res => { this.toast.showToast( TOAST_STATE.success, 'You have successfully registered!'); this.dismissError(); console.log('Registered', res); }) .catch(error => { this.toast.showToast( TOAST_STATE.danger, 'Something went wrong, could not register' ); this.dismissError(); console.log('Something went wrong', error.message); }); } private dismissError(): void { setTimeout(() => { this.toast.dismissToast(); }, 2000); }
}

    That's it. That's all.

    Ria

Items.Title: 成为 Linux 向导的第一步。 | First step toward becoming a Linux Wizard.
Items.Description:
第1部分

看视频

首先，什么是 CLI？

  • 它是一个用户界面，没有漂亮的图形。
  • 我们将使用命令来搞乱。

  • 比方说，如果你想在你的电脑上打开一个文件夹，我们将为此使用命令，不要惊慌，这比看起来容易忍受我，

  • 顺便说一句，CLI 使用 BASH 作为编程语言。

命令行界面

  • 这里， haris是 PC 管理员名称
  • 了解目录及其路径
    • 所有文件夹都像树层次结构，从根目录开始，

    基本命令

    • 标志是参数/选项
    • 当前目录
    • 自动完成- 输入目录的第一个字母，然后按tab
    • 或仅使用文件类型或仅使用文件名查找

      • 现在您已准备好成为 Linux 向导，
         第 2 部分见

理解简单 - Apr 28 4月28日

Josue Luzardo Gebrim - Josue Luzardo Gebrim - May 1 5月1日



原文:

Part 1

Watch Video

Start with, what is a CLI?

  • It is a user interface, which doesn't have pretty graphics.
  • We'll use the commands to mess around.

  • Let's say if you want to open a folder on your PC, we'll be using commands for that, don't freak out, its easy than it seems just bear with me,

  • By the way, CLI uses BASH as a programming language.

CLI

  • here, haris is PC admin name
  • cosmos is name of my PC
  • ~ is representing Home directory
  • $ means we're in the system shell, and ready to type commands

Understand Directories and their Path

  • All folders are like Tree Hierarchy, starting from Root Directory,

Basic Commands

  • pwd present working directory
  • ls check the content of the directory
  • cd change directory
  • cd.. change directory to previous directory
  • cd../..change directory to previous two times
  • cd~ change directory to Home Directory
  • flags are arguments/options
  • ls -a to list all the hidden files
  • ls -l show detailed versions of files
  • ls -la show detailed version of all hidden files
  • clear clear the terminal (ctrl+l)
  • . current directory
  • .. parent Directory
  • ~home Directory
  • - previous Directory
  • mkdir make a directory
  • touch Create a new file
  • file give info about file
  • gedit edit file
  • cat view content of a file, concatenate files
  • historydisplays history of commands that were executed
  • uparrow display previous commands
  • ctrl + r reverse search
  • ctrl + cexit
  • Autocomplete - type first letter of the directory then press tab
  • cp copy files
  • mv move files
  • rm remove files
  • mkdir -p make a directory in the subdirectory
  • rm -r remove recursively
  • rm -rv remove recursively and display removed directory
  • find ~ -name find a file in home directory


or find it only with file type or only with file name

  • find ~ -type d -name find folder
  • man find the manual of any command
  • whatis tells about command

Now you are ready to become a Linux Wizard,
See you in Part 2

Understanding Simplicity - Apr 28

Josue Luzardo Gebrim - May 1
Items.Author: sheoranharis

Items.Title: 实现明暗模式 | Implementing dark and light mode
Items.Description:
如今，可以选择切换到“暗”或“亮”模式的网站已成为一种常见的景象。 为网络用户提供这样的选择可以帮助应用程序或网站获得更多流量，因为它对可能有视力问题的人来说是可访问的。 在这篇博客中，我将简要介绍如何将此功能整合到您的开发中！

第1步

一个重要的步骤是选择一个赏心悦目且易于导航的调色板。 使用诸如MyColor之类的调色板生成器可以帮助选择最佳的补充调色板

第2步

一旦选择了浅色和深色调色板，就可以为切换按钮添加一些 HTML。 对于我的项目，我知道我想添加一些花哨的切换按钮，但鉴于这是我的第一个官方项目，我依赖于外部资源。 然后为按钮分配一个类。 对我来说是新的，我了解到它从 SVG 文档中获取节点并将它们复制到其他地方。 便利！

第 3 步

添加你的 CSS。 我不想更改创建者选择的任何样式，所以我决定保留按钮的 CSS。

第4步

职能！ 监听事件！ 我在我的切换按钮上附加了一个 listenerEvent 并使用了 forEach ，这样每次它都会触发我的切换功能。 我的网站默认是暗模式，所以功能是切换到亮。

结论

就是这样！ 这是一个有趣的第一个项目，我迫不及待地想看看我还能学到什么！



原文:

Websites with options to switch to a "dark" or "light" mode have become a common sight these days. Offering the web user a choice such as that could help an app or website gain more traffic all because it's accessibility to people who may have vision concerns. In this blog I will briefly go over how to incorporate this function into your development!

Step 1

An important step is choosing a color palette that is pleasing to the eye and easy to navigate. Using a color palette generator such as MyColor can help choose the best complimenting palettes

Step 2

Once your light and dark palettes have been chosen, it's to add some HTML for your toggle buttons. For my project I knew I wanted to add some fancy toggle buttons, but seeing as this was my first official project I relied on an outside source. Link did an amazing job at building these sun and moon buttons!

Then assign a class to the buttons. was new to me and I learned that it takes nodes from the SVG document and duplicates them somewhere else. Handy!

Step 3

Add your CSS. I didn't want to change any styling the creator chose, so I decided to keep the CSS for the buttons.

Step 4

Javascript! Functions! ListenerEvents! I attached a listenerEvent to my toggle button and used forEach so that with each it fires off my toggle function. My site's default is dark mode, so the function is to toggle to light.

Conclusion

And that's it! This was a fun first project and I can't wait to see what else I learn!
Items.Author: cmarguerite

Items.Title: 适用于 iOS 的增强现实示例集合 | Collection of augmented reality samples for iOS
Items.Description:
这是我第一次在 Dev.to 上发帖！ 我刚刚发布了一组 AR 功能，可以使用 iOS 作为开源来完成。

背景

在开发应用程序（或任何系统）时，我们通常会定义用户的问题及其解决方案，然后进行设计和开发。 当 AR 包含在这个过程中时，我们有好几次实施它，但最终没有将其发布到生产环境中。 在普通屏幕（2D）UIUX 开发的情况下，诸如 Figma 之类的设计工具可以帮助快速、廉价地识别“错误”，并且一开始就有最佳实践和指导方针，但现在还不是这样增强现实。

结果，当一个设计被实施但没有被生产环境采用时，负责人的积极性下降，知识没有积累等等。
因此，我们决定创建一个功能列表之类的东西，希望可以对列表中的“AR可以做什么”有一个粗略的了解，然后尝试一下或进行一些更改并验证它以更好地发布经验。

代码

塔维亚实验

功能列表

  1. 放置图像中心

  2. 放置视频中心

  3. 放置对象中心

  4. 放置 Gif 中心

  5. 将图像放置在点击处

  6. 检测、裁剪和放置字母数字

  7. 检测和裁剪颜色

请从这里查看代码。
https://github.com/tavia-oss/TaviaExperiments https://github.com/tavia-oss/TaviaExperiments



原文:

This is my first time posting on Dev.to! I have just released a collection of AR functions that can be done using iOS as an open source.

Background

In developing an app (or any system), we usually define the user's problem and its solution, then design and develop it. When AR was included in this process, there were several times when we implemented it but ended up not releasing it to the production. In the case of the normal screen(2D) UIUX development, design tools such as Figma can help to quickly and inexpensively identify the "wrongness", and best practices and guidelines are available, to begin with, but this is not yet the case with AR.

As a result, when a design is implemented but not adopted for the production environment, the motivation of the person in charge is down, knowledge is not accumulated, and so on.
Therefore, we decided to create something like a list of functions, hoping that it would be possible to have a rough understanding of "what AR can do" in a list, and then try it out or make some changes and verify it to ship better experience.

Code

Tavia Experiments

List of Features

  1. Place Image Center

  2. Place Video Center

  3. Place Object Center

  4. Place Gif Center

  5. Place Image At Tapped

  6. Detect, Crop And Place Alphanumeric

  7. Detect And Crop Color

Please check out the code from here.
https://github.com/tavia-oss/TaviaExperiments
